_comment: Tier-2: Kratos requires `mp.AddNodalSolutionStepVariable(KM.DISPLACEMENT)` BEFORE nodes are created. Accessing a variable that wasn't added raises RuntimeError 'This container only can store the variables specified in its variables list'. Same pitfall family I documented retroactively from PR #24: variable allocation ordering. [Re-linked: index 88→9 after kratos linear_elasticity Table-1 promotion 2026-06-01.]
